---
title: Tea Tasting Statisticians
listing:
  contents: posts/*/index.md
  type: default
  sort: "date desc"
  max-items: 12
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
  categories: true
---

We are **Tea Tasting Statisticians**. This blog shares practical notes on biostatistics, regulatory science, clinical trial design, and real-world evidence.

For all posts, visit the [Posts](/posts/) page.
